name: get_yearly_temperature_measures
description: Retrieve yearly temperature measurements for a home within a specified date range for annual temperature tracking and long-term climate data analysis

end_date.description: The end date for the temperature measurement period in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2027-01-01T00:00:00+01:00)

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home for which to retrieve temperature measurements

start_date.description: The start date for the temperature measurement period in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2026-01-01T00:00:00+01:00)
